title: Abutting property owners' liability
doc_html:
§3354.  Abutting property owners' liability

The abutting property owners shall pay for the balance of the cost of the improvements, in proportion to the respective front footage of the properties owned by them and abutting on the street or alley to be improved.
doc_text:
§3354.  Abutting property owners' liability
The abutting property owners shall pay for the balance of the cost of the improvements, in proportion to the respective front footage of the properties owned by them and abutting on the street or alley to be improved.
